scope: Measure repaired realistic freeform human prompts against certified ACLI workflow entrypoints without redesigning routing architecture, OCS, PPP, worker lifecycle, replay, or providers.

FREEFORM_DEVELOPMENT.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> Development Intake -> PPP -> Authorization -> Worker Lifecycle
FREEFORM_DEVELOPMENT.observed_summary: All sampled development prompts selected NATIVE_DEVELOPMENT_CONTEXT_INTEGRATION, created native development intake evidence, reached PPP, authorization, worker lifecycle, and replay certification.

FREEFORM_COGNITION.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS Cognition OR HIRR Clarification
FREEFORM_COGNITION.observed_summary: Sampled cognition prompts selected safe OCS or HIRR clarification handling and did not directly invoke workers.

FREEFORM_APPROVAL.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS -> Approval Required
FREEFORM_APPROVAL.observed_summary: All sampled production-risk prompts selected OCS_LLM_COGNITION and stopped at APPROVAL_REQUIRED without worker invocation.

FREEFORM_DOMAIN_CREATION.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> Domain Proposal Governance
FREEFORM_DOMAIN_CREATION.observed_summary: All sampled domain prompts created DOMAIN_PROPOSAL_ARTIFACT_V1 evidence and stopped before candidate creation, activation, workers, or execution.

FREEFORM_CLARIFICATION.observed_summary: All sampled broad improvement prompts selected HUMAN_INTENT_CLARIFICATION_INTAKE and reached CLARIFICATION without worker invocation.

FREEFORM_AMBIGUOUS_REQUEST.expected_route: Human Prompt -> ACLI -> OCS -> Clarification OR Cognition
FREEFORM_AMBIGUOUS_REQUEST.observed_summary: All sampled ambiguous business automation prompts selected safe OCS handling and reached clarification without arbitrary execution, arbitrary domain creation, or approval bypass.

routing_repair.development: Added low-risk utility/tool/script freeform detection to native development intake.
routing_repair.cognition: Added employee evaluation, hiring process, and AI compliance architecture freeform OCS intake phrases.
routing_repair.approval: Added production customer data, external users, and production rollout freeform approval phrases.
routing_repair.domain: Expanded plain domain proposal detection to need/want/create HR, code auditing, and supplier evaluation domain phrasing.
routing_repair.clarification: Routed broad improvement prompts to OCS clarification.
routing_repair.ambiguous: Routed broad AI/business automation prompts to safe OCS clarification/cognition handling.
